matches.title: Match Schedule
matches.noFavoriteMatches: No matches for your favorite teams
matches.worldcupSubtitle: Live broadcast channels & match times for every game

teams.title: Select Teams
teams.infoText: You will receive a notification 15 minutes before your selected teams' matches.

settings.title: Settings
settings.notificationsDesc: Get notified 15 minutes before match start
settings.noGoalDisclaimer: We intentionally do not send goal notifications — we don't want to spoil your match-watching experience. Only 15-minute pre-match reminders are sent.
settings.permissionWarning: Notification permission denied. Please allow it in app settings.
settings.countryDesc: Channels shown for each match depend on your selected country.
settings.appDesc: Follow matches on the right channel at the right time.

paywall.subtitle: Sports TV Guide
paywall.priceNote: After the 10-day free trial, billed at {{price}}/month. Cancel anytime.
paywall.legalIos: Charged to your iTunes account. Subscription automatically renews unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.
paywall.legalAndroid: Charged to your Google Play account. Cancel anytime through Google Play.
paywall.errorPurchase: Purchase could not be completed. Please try again.
paywall.errorNoSub: No active subscription found for this account.
paywall.offeringError: Unable to load subscription options. Please check your internet connection.
